homepage.heroSubline: 24/7 emergency towing when you need it most. We handle breakdowns, accidents, and impounds across Tulsa County with speed and care.
homepage.aboutTitle: Legacy Towing: Tulsa's Reliable Roadside Partner
aboutText: Since 2012, Legacy Towing has been pulling Tulsa drivers out of tough spots. Founded by two brothers who grew up fixing cars in Brookside, we understand how crucial reliable transport is in our sprawling metro.
Our drivers train for Oklahoma's extreme weather - from summer blowouts to winter slide-offs. No fancy gimmicks, just fast hooks and honest service when you're stranded on Route 66 or I-44.
We sponsor little league teams in Maple Ridge and donate impound auction proceeds to Tulsa's emergency weather shelters. When tornado season hits, our fleet's first on scene clearing debris.

valueProps.title: 15-Minute Average Response
valueProps.description: GPS-tracked trucks mean we reach you faster, whether you're downtown or stuck on the BA Expressway.

valueProps.title: All-Weather Recovery
valueProps.description: Specialized equipment for ice storm slide-offs and flood rescues across Green Country.

valueProps.title: Fair Upfront Pricing
valueProps.description: No surprise fees - we quote your tow before hooking, with price locks for Tulsa County.

valueProps.title: Local Knowledge
valueProps.description: Drivers born and raised here know every alley in the Blue Dome District and backroad to Broken Arrow.

homepage.ctaSubline: Call 555-TOW-R94 for immediate dispatch. We'll get you moving before your coffee goes cold.

services.name: Emergency Towing
services.shortDescription: 24/7 accident recovery and breakdown towing across Tulsa County.
services.description:
When your car quits on the I-244 on-ramp or you're in a fender-bender near Woodland Hills Mall, we're the team Tulsa calls. Our heavy-duty wreckers can extract vehicles from ditches after ice storms or haul SUVs that overheated in Riverside Drive traffic.

All drivers carry Oklahoma DOT certifications and trauma kits. We coordinate directly with Tulsa PD at accident scenes to clear roads faster. From Priuses to lifted trucks stuck under low bridges in the Brady Arts District, our fleet handles it.
process: Step 1: Call our dispatch with your exact location - we'll ping your phone if you're unsure
Step 2: Describe your vehicle and situation (accident, mechanical failure, etc)
Step 3: Receive ETA and upfront quote - no guessing
Step 4: Driver arrives with proper equipment for your specific vehicle type
benefits: Direct billing to most Tulsa insurance providers

faq.question: Do you tow motorcycles involved in accidents?
faq.answer: Yes - we dispatch specialized bike lifts with wheel chocks and ratchet straps. Our team has recovered bikes from Route 66 to the Okmulgee backroads.

faq.question: What if my car's blocking traffic on 71st Street?
faq.answer: Call us first - as city contractors, we prioritize congested areas and can often beat police response times during rush hour.

services.name: Long Distance Towing
services.shortDescription: Reliable interstate transport from Tulsa to anywhere in Oklahoma.
services.description:
Moving a college student's car to Stillwater? Hauling an auction find back from McAlester? Our Oklahoma-licensed drivers handle cross-state tows with care. We secure vehicles properly for Turner Turnpike winds and monitor weather alerts when crossing tornado-prone areas like Creek County.

Unlike national chains, we're based right here in Tulsa - meaning no depot delays when you need to retrieve your vehicle. Our enclosed trailers protect classics during dust storm season, while heavy-duty rigs manage farm equipment from Pawnee to Pryor.
process: Step 1: Provide pickup/dropoff ZIP codes and vehicle details
Step 2: Receive binding quote with fuel surcharge waiver for Oklahoma routes
Step 3: Schedule flexible pickup window (we'll call 30 mins out)
Step 4: Track your tow via text updates until delivery
benefits: Overnight parking at our secure Tulsa lot

faq.question: Can you tow from Tulsa to Dallas?
faq.answer: We specialize in Oklahoma routes, but can arrange Texas transfers through trusted partners - ask about our Red River package.

faq.question: Do you transport non-running vehicles?
faq.answer: Absolutely - our wheel-lift systems move cars without start capability. Just note any leak risks upfront.

services.name: Impound Recovery
services.shortDescription: Fast, discreet vehicle retrieval from Tulsa-area impound lots.
services.description:
Whether your car was towed from a Cherry Street parking spot or seized as evidence in a Rogers County case, we know the drill. Our team handles paperwork at all major Tulsa impound facilities, including the city yard off Admiral and private lots near 51st & Memorial.

We negotiate storage fee reductions when possible and provide affidavit services for wrongfully towed vehicles. For DUIs or other sensitive situations, we offer after-hours pickup to maintain privacy. Need a ride to the lot? Our retrieval package includes round-trip transport in our service van.
process: Step 1: Verify your vehicle's location with Tulsa PD or our dispatch
Step 2: Email/fax us your registration and ID for pre-clearance
Step 3: Pay fees directly through our secure portal (we cover cash-only lots)
Step 4: We deliver your car to any Tulsa address with full documentation

faq.question: My car was towed from a private lot in Brookside - now what?
faq.answer: We track all private impounds daily. Provide the street address and we'll locate your vehicle within hours, not days.

faq.question: Can you get my truck out of police impound same-day?
faq.answer: For non-evidence holds, usually yes. We're on rotation with TPD and can expedite most releases before shift change at 3PM.

services.name: Heavy Duty Recovery
services.shortDescription: Industrial towing for work trucks, RVs, and equipment in Green Country.
services.description:
When your dump truck buries itself in a Jenks construction site or your RV jams on a steep Keystone Lake access road, standard wreckers won't cut it. Our 50-ton rotators and Landoll trailers handle Oklahoma's toughest recoveries.

We're the call Tulsa contractors make after oilfield blowouts near Cushing or when combines get stuck in Osage County mud. Our recovery specialists train monthly on new equipment - including how to upright overturned semis on icy Will Rogers Turnpike curves without further damage.
process: Step 1: Describe your stuck vehicle/equipment and terrain
Step 2: We dispatch appropriate rig - often within the hour
Step 3: On-site assessment with digital report to your insurance
Step 4: Recovery using minimal-force techniques to prevent damage
benefits: Oklahoma Corporation Commission permits on file

faq.question: Can you recover a tractor-trailer stuck in sand at Keystone Lake?
faq.answer: Done it before - our tracked recovery vehicle handles loose terrain that would sink conventional wreckers.

faq.question: Do you service oil sites near Drumright?
faq.answer: Yes - we maintain special permits for refinery zone recoveries and carry explosion-proof equipment.

services.name: Classic Car Transport
services.shortDescription: White-glove moving for collectibles and vintage vehicles in Oklahoma.
services.description:
Transporting your restored '57 Thunderbird to the Brady Arts car show? Moving Grandpa's Model A to your Broken Arrow garage? We treat classics like our own - which is why Tulsa collectors trust us.

Our enclosed trailers feature air-ride suspension and climate control for paint protection during humid Oklahoma summers. Drivers use soft straps and wheel nets, never chains. Need to ship to Barrett-Jackson? We coordinate door-to-door with Arizona partners, handling all COTUS paperwork at our Tulsa office.
process: Step 1: Share photos of your vehicle's clearance and delicate areas
Step 2: We create a custom loading plan (ramp vs liftgate)
Step 3: Conduct pre-transport walkthrough video together
Step 4: Secure with museum-grade restraints and monitor humidity en route
benefits: Former Pebble Beach transporters on staff

faq.question: How do you protect chrome during Oklahoma's winter road treatments?
faq.answer: We apply temporary protective film before transport and wash vehicles at our detail bay upon delivery - no salt residue left behind.

faq.question: Can you store my Corvette until the Tulsa Rod Show?
faq.answer: Yes - our climate-controlled warehouse near 41st & Yale has 24/7 security and weekly battery tenders.

reviews.name: Marcus T.
reviews.text: Flat tire on the BA Expressway during rush hour - Legacy had me hooked up before the highway patrol even arrived. Driver knew exactly how to position the truck to block traffic safely. Will never call anyone else in Tulsa.

reviews.name: Danielle K.
reviews.text: My Civic got towed from a sketchy lot near the Blue Dome District. These guys not only found it fast but argued the fees down since the signage wasn't legit. Delivered it to my apartment with a full tank - unheard of service.

reviews.name: Ricky L.
reviews.text: Our dump truck sunk to the axles at a Sand Springs job site. Legacy's rotator pulled it out without tearing up the fresh asphalt. Their operator even stayed to help spread gravel where we got stuck. Tulsa's only call for serious recoveries.

reviews.name: Sheryl B.
reviews.text: Entrusted them with my '69 Camaro SS for the trip from Claremore to Tulsa. They padded every inch of the trailer and sent photo updates at each stop. Arrived cleaner than when it left. These guys understand car people.

reviews.name: James P.
reviews.text: Needed my son's college beater hauled from OU back to Tulsa after it died. Quote beat uShip by $200 and they picked it up same-day. Driver texted me the whole way - even stopped to check the straps when that tornado warning hit Chandler.

reviews.name: Maria G.
reviews.text: Hit black ice on 169 near Mohawk Park and ended up in the median. Dispatcher stayed on the line until help arrived, and the driver had hot coffee waiting. They knew exactly which Tulsa body shop could take my CR-V immediately.

service-areas.title: Tulsa Towing Service Areas | Surrounding Cities
service-areas.description: We cover all Tulsa neighborhoods and surrounding OK communities. Immediate dispatch to your exact location.

serviceAreas.content: Legacy Towing proudly serves the Tulsa area with reliable and professional towing services. Whether you're stranded on the side of the road or need a tow to a local repair shop, our team is available 24/7 to assist you. Tulsa's busy highways and urban streets require prompt service, and we're committed to getting you back on the road quickly and safely. Our experienced drivers know the city well, ensuring efficient service no matter where you are.
serviceAreas.localContext: Tulsa is Oklahoma's second-largest city, known for its vibrant arts scene and bustling downtown.

serviceAreas.content: Legacy Towing provides fast and dependable towing services in Broken Arrow, ensuring residents and visitors receive prompt assistance. From minor breakdowns to major accidents, our team is equipped to handle all towing needs with care. Broken Arrow's growing community relies on us for roadside assistance, and we take pride in delivering top-notch service every time.
serviceAreas.localContext: Broken Arrow is one of Tulsa's fastest-growing suburbs, offering a mix of suburban charm and modern amenities.
